mainEntity.name: What if ChatGPT recommends unethical lawyers in Houston?

acceptedAnswer.text: ChatGPT lacks real-time ethics checks; Houston clients must verify via TX bar discipline records despite recommendations.

suggestedAnswer.text: AI flaw—always cross-verify. Lawyers: Clean record boosts long-term.
